thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v99 (Roadmap Phase 1d): dynamic factor weights via offline-generated rolling-IR softmax schedule. Same 11 factors as v97 (xs_minimal_v12 = v94 baseline + stress_liq_conc_iv) but weights vary over time. Schedule generated by scripts/quant_research/phase_1d_dynamic_weight_schedule.py with quarterly rebalances: per-factor rolling IR computed using expanding lookback ending 5 trading days before each rebalance (PIT-correct), sign-aware softmax(|IR|/temperature=1.0) gives signed weights summing to |1.0|, 20% relative-change rate limit per rebalance prevents thrash, bootstrap quarters use v97 normalized weights when lookback < 180 days. v93 multiplier overlay (m7 = btc_eth_max_iv_aggressive_tanh_v1) preserved at portfolio sizing layer. Directly addresses v95+v96 lesson that hand-tuned weights carry empirical information wholesale IC-proportional rebuilds destroy — dynamic weights are *incremental* rebuilds (each quarter ±20% max), preserving fine-tuning while adapting. Schedule diagnostics (12 quarters total): first 2 bootstrap (insufficient lookback), 10 dynamic. Convergence pattern: 6 weights clipped at 2024Q1 transition, dropping to 0 clipped from 2025Q1 onwards (system stabilized). Top weights consistently iv_smooth_20 / dh_20 / dh_60 — matches Phase 1d stability diagnostic finding. Schedule path: artifacts/quant_research/shadow_oos/dynamic_weight_schedule_2026-04-26-cross-sectional-daily-1d-h5d-features-v91.json.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-3 liquid perp-covered names by 11 z-score factors with quarterly-rebalanced rolling-IR softmax weights (no static factor weights), then scale all positions by DVOL regime multiplier. Expected: rank IC similar to v97 0.187 (dynamic weights typically modestly improve ranking by emphasizing high-IR factors), WF median sharpe ~0.95 +/- 0.05 (v97 0.954; dynamic should be similar or slightly better if IR-based weighting outperforms hand-tune; worse if weight adaptation introduces extra noise), worst regime sharpe ~-2.5 (similar to v97 -2.486; multiplier overlay unchanged). Critical assumption: rolling-IR signals are stable enough to give meaningful weight allocations (not pure noise) and rate-limit (20% per quarter) is sufficient to prevent thrash. Falsification triggers v99 rejection if WF median sharpe < 0.85 (regression vs v97 by > 0.10) OR worst regime sharpe < -2.9 OR rank IC < 0.155.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = sum(w_t[f] * z(f)) for f in 11 factors, where w_t lookup from offline-generated dynamic_weight_schedule_*.json (quarterly rolling-IR softmax with sign-aware weighting, ±20% rate limit, |w_t|sum=1.0); final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); position_multiplier_overlay = clip(1 - tanh((max(btc_dvol_z90, eth_dvol_z90) - 0.5) * 3), 0.2, 1.0) applied at portfolio sizing layer (not in raw_score)
